era_context: Early Bronze Age III. Egypt's Old Kingdom in its final century. Mesopotamian city-states in the post-Akkadian period. Indus Valley Civilization at its height. Traditional Xia Dynasty period in China (chronology disputed).
geographic_coverage_gaps: All regions except Egypt and Indus Valley have minimal or no documentation
disconfirming_evidence: No events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: No contemporary records, inscriptions, or reliably dated archaeological contexts are known for 2997 BCE. The year is historically invisible in surviving sources.
